task_objective: Fix Updates panel version reconciliation after Decky installer handoff when the previous frontend-only optimistic update did not survive reload/startup timing.
design_decisions: Keep fresh pending update installs through a short startup mismatch grace window instead of clearing them while the old backend version may still be loaded.
Expose effective_installed_version in update-check context so the frontend can distinguish fresh pending install state from stale pending metadata.
Require installer handoff confirmation before pending metadata becomes the effective installed version, and clear pending metadata when installer handoff fails.
Hydrate PluginUpdateSection's installed override from pending install context and update shared Versions state after reload.
Use the backend installed_version as the hydrated pre-install baseline so old version metadata replacing Loading... does not clear the pending display.
Guard late in-flight stale update checks against the pending target version so they cannot restore the install button.
results: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/: passed
